description: Fix evaluation report not appearing after submitting exam. Multiple issues: (1) showConfirm() fallback if main.js modal is not available, (2) Reduce Groq API timeout from 10s to 5s for Render free tier, (3) Wrap stopCamera/stopEyeDetection in try/catch so errors don't block form submission, (4) Add processing overlay to show loading state during submission.
steps: In static/js/exam.js: Add guard for showConfirm - if undefined, fall back to native confirm()
In static/js/exam.js submitExam(): Wrap stopCamera() and stopEyeDetection() in try/catch blocks
In app/routers/exam.py: Reduce asyncio.wait_for timeout from 10.0 to 5.0 seconds
In templates/exam_questions.html: Add a processing overlay div that shows when form is submitted
In static/js/exam.js: Show processing overlay before form.submit()
acceptance_criteria: Clicking Submit Exam works even if showConfirm/modal is not available
Errors in stopCamera/stopEyeDetection do not prevent form submission
Groq API timeout is 5 seconds instead of 10
A loading/processing overlay appears while the form is being submitted
